meta.title: NimbleFingers 2026
meta.welcome: WELCOME — I am so excited about this week! This site contains resources to help you keep going months after camp.

posts.title: Before we begin
posts.body:
Glad to have you in class. This page is where I'll drop videos, practice tracks, and notes — during the week and well after. Come back to it for months; that's the whole point.
For now, have a look at the listening list and warm up with Wildwood Flower.

items.title: Don't this road look rough and rocky — chorus
Don't this road look rough and rocky

items.text: Don Rigsby & Dudley Connell — Meet Me by the Moonlight
Tony Rice & Ricky Skaggs — Skaggs & Rice
